titleStmt.title: Nogawa plates of Dhruvasena II, [Valabhńę] year 320, Bhadrapada ba. 5

licence.p: This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

msContents.summary: Grant of land (100 bhaktńę) in NavagrńĀmaka (= Nogawa) in favour of two Yajurvedins.

projectDesc.p: This project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_IdListMembers_v01.xml file.

div.p:
* svasti valabhińętaŠł• prasabhapraŠĻáatńĀmitrańĀŠĻáńĀŠĻĀ maitrakńĀŠĻáańĀm atulabalasampannamaŠĻáŠłćalńĀbhogasaŠĻĀsaktaprahńĀra
ŇõatalabdhapratńĀpńĀt pratńĀpopanatadńĀnamańĀnńĀrjjavopńĀrjjitńĀnurńĀgńĀd anuraktamaulabhŠĻõtaŇõreŠĻáńębalńĀvńĀptarńĀjya
ŇõriyaŠł• paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł•ŇõrńębhaŠĻ≠ńĀrkkńĀd avyavacchinnarńĀjavaŠĻÖŇõńĀn mńĀtńĀpitŠĻõcaraŠĻáńĀravindapraŠĻáatipravidhautńĀŇõeŠĻ£akalmaŠĻ£aŠł•
ŇõaiŇõavńĀt prabhŠĻõti khaŠłćgadvitńęyabńĀhur eva samadaparagajaghaŠĻ≠ńĀsphoŠĻ≠anaprakńĀŇõitasatvanikaŠĻ£aŠł• tatprabhńĀvapraŠĻáatńĀ
rńĀticŇęŠłćńĀrńĀatnaprabhńĀsaŠĻĀsaktapńĀdanakharaŇõmisaŠĻÖhatiŠł• sakalasmŠĻõtipraŠĻáńętamńĀrggasamyakŠĻ£paripńĀlanaprajńĀhŠĻõdayara
√ĪjanńĀnvarttharńĀjaŇõabdo rŇęparkńĀntisthairyyagńĀmbhińęryyabuddhisampadbhiŠł• smaraŇõaŇõńĀŠĻÖkńĀddrirńĀjodadhitridaŇõagurŇęudhaneŇõńĀn ati
ŇõayńĀnaŠł• ŇõaraŠĻáńĀgatńĀbhayapradńĀnaparatayańĀ tŠĻõŠĻáavadapńĀstańĀŇõeŠĻ£asvakańĀryyaphalaŠł• prńĀrtthanńĀdhikańĀrtthapradńĀnńĀnandita
vidvatsuhŠĻõtpraŠĻáayihŠĻõdayaŠłę pńĀdacńĀrńęva sakalabhuvanamaŠĻáŠłćalńĀbhogapramodaŠł• paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł• Ňõrńęguhasena
s tasya sutas tatpńĀdanakhamayŇękhasantańĀnavisŠĻõtajńĀhnavńęjalaughaprakŠĻ£ańĀlitńĀŇõeŠĻ£akalmaŠĻ£aŠł• praŠĻáayiŇõatasahasropajńęvya
mńĀnasampad rŇępalobhńĀd ivńĀŇõritaŠł• sarabhasam ańĀbhigńĀmikair gguŠĻáaits sahajaŇõaktiŇõikŠĻ£ńĀviŇõeŠĻ£avismńĀpitńĀkhiladhanu
rddharaŠł• prathńĀamanarapatisamatisŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻ≠ańĀnńĀm anupańĀlayitńĀ dharmmadńĀyńĀnńĀm apńĀkarttńĀ prajopaghńĀtakńĀri
ŠĻáńĀm upaplavańĀnńĀŠĻĀ darŇõayitńĀ Ňõrńęsarasvatyor ekńĀdhipvńĀsasya saŠĻĀhatńĀrńĀtipakŠĻ£alakŠĻ£mńęparibhogadakŠĻ£avikramo vikramopasaŠĻĀ
prńĀptavimalapńĀrtthivaŇõrńęŠł• paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł• Ňõrńędharasenas tasya sutas tatpńĀdńĀnudhyańĀtaŠł• sakalajagadńĀnandanańĀtyadbhutńĀa
guŠĻáasamudayasthagitasamagradibŠĻÖmaŠĻáŠłćalaŠł• samaraŇõatavijayaŇõobhńĀsanańĀthamaŠĻáŠłćalńĀgradyutibhńĀsuratarńĀnsapńęŠĻ≠hodŇęŠłćha
gurŇęumanorathamahńĀbhańĀraŠł• sarvvavidyńĀparńĀvparavibhńĀgńĀdhigamavimalamatir api sarvvatas subhańĀŠĻ£italavenńĀpi sukhopapńĀ
danńęyaparitoŠĻ£aŠł• samagralokńĀgńĀdhagńĀmbhńęryyahŠĻõdayo pi sucaritńĀtiŇõayasuvyaktaparamakalyańĀŠĻáasvabhńĀvaŠł• khilńę
bhŇętakŠĻõtayuganŠĻõpatipathaviŇõodhanńĀdhigatodagrakńęrttir dharmmńĀnuparodhojjvalatarińękŠĻõtańĀrtthasukhasampadupasevńĀnirŇę
ŠłćhadharmmńĀdityadvitńęyanńĀmńĀ paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł• ŇõrńęŇõńęlńĀdityas tasyńĀnujas tatpańĀdańĀnudhyańĀtaŠł• svayam upendraguruŠĻáeva guruŠĻáńĀ
tyńĀdaravatńĀ samabhilaŠĻ£aŠĻáńęyńĀm api rńĀjalakŠĻ£mińęŠĻĀ skandhańĀsaktańĀŠĻĀ paramabhadra Iva dhuryyas tadńĀj√ĪańĀsampańĀdanaikarasatayaivodvaha
n khedasukharartibhyańĀm anańĀyańĀsitasatvasampattiŠł• prabhńĀvasampadvaŇõńękŠĻõtanŠĻõpatiŇõataŇõiroratnacchńĀyopagŇęŠłćhapńĀdapńęŠĻ≠ho pi
parńĀvaj√ĪńĀbhimańĀnarasńĀnńĀliŠĻÖgitamanovŠĻõttiŠł• praŠĻáatim ekńĀŠĻĀ parityajya prakhyńĀtapauruŠĻ£ńĀbhimńĀnair apy arńĀtibhir anńĀsńĀdita
pratikriyopńĀyaŠł• kŠĻõtanikhilabhuvanańĀmodavimalaguŠĻáasaŠĻÖhatiŠł• prasabhavighaŠĻ≠itasakalakalivilasitagatir nnńęcajanńĀ
dhirohibhir aŇõeŠĻ£air ddoŠĻ£air anańĀmŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻ≠ńĀtyunnatahŠĻõdayaŠł• prakhyńĀtapauruŠĻ£ńĀstrakauŇõalńĀtiŇõayagaŠĻáatithavipakŠĻ£akŠĻ£itiŠĻ£patilakŠĻ£mńę
svayaŠĻĀgrahaprakańĀŇõitapravńęrapuruŠĻ£aprathamasaŠĻĀkhyńĀdhigamaŠł• paramamańĀheŇõvaraŠł• Ňõrńękharagrahas tasya tanaya
s tatpńĀdńĀnudhyańĀtaŠł• sakalavidyańĀdhigamavihitanikhilavidvajjanamanaŠł•paritoŠĻ£ńĀtiŇõayaŠł• satvasampadańĀ tyańĀgaudńĀryye
ŠĻáa ca vigatańĀnusandhńĀnńĀŇõamńĀhitńĀrańĀtipakŠĻ£amanorathńĀkŠĻ£abhaŠĻÖgaŠł• samyagupalakŠĻ£itańĀnekaŇõńĀstrakalńĀlokacarita
gahvaravibhńĀgo pi paramabhadraprakŠĻõtir akŠĻõtrimaprasŇõrayavinayaŇõobhńĀvibhŇęŠĻ£aŠĻáaŠł• samaraŇõatajayapatńĀkńĀha
raŠĻáapratyalodagrabńĀhudaŠĻáŠłćavidhvansitanikhilapratipakŠĻ£adarppodayaŠł• svadhanuŠł•prabhńĀvaparibhuŇętńĀstrakauŇõalńĀbhimńĀ
naŠł• sakalanŠĻõpatimaŠĻáŠłćalńĀbhinanditaŇõńĀsanńĀaŠł• paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł• Ňõrńędharasenas tatsyńĀnujas tatpńĀdńĀnudhyńĀtaŠł• saccaritńĀtiŇõayita
sakalapŇęrvvanarapatir atidussńĀdhńĀnńĀm api prasńĀdhayitńĀ viŠĻ£ayńĀŠĻáńĀŠĻĀ mŇęrttimńĀn iva puruŠĻ£akńĀraŠł• parivŠĻõrddhaguŠĻáńĀnurńĀga
nirbbharacittavŠĻõttibhir mmanur iva svayam abhyupapannaŠł• prakŠĻõtibhir adhigatakalńĀkalńĀpaŠł• kńĀntimńĀn nirvŠĻõtihetur akalaŠĻÖkaŠł•
kumudanńĀthaŠł• prńĀjyapratńĀpasthagitadigantarńĀlapradhvansitadhvńĀntarńĀŇõis satatoditas savitńĀ prakŠĻõtibhyaŠłę paraŠĻĀ pratyayam a
rtthavantam atibahutithaprayojanńĀnubandham ańĀgamaparipŇęrŠĻáŠĻáaŠĻĀ vidadhńĀnaŠł• ŠĻ£sandhivigrahasamńĀsaniŇõcayanipuŠĻáaŠł• sthńĀnae nu
ruŇępam ńĀdeŇõaŠĻĀ dadad guŠĻáavŠĻõddhividhńĀnajanitasaŠĻĀskńĀras sańĀdhŇęnńĀŠĻĀ rńĀjyasńĀlńĀturńęyatantrayor ubhayor apai niŠĻ£ŠĻáńĀtaŠł•
prakŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻ≠avikramo pi karuŠĻáńĀmŠĻõduhŠĻõdayaŠł• ŇõrutavńĀn apy agarvvitaŠł• kńĀnto pi praŇõamńę sthirasauhŠĻõdayyo pi nirasitńĀ do
ŠĻ£avatńĀm udayasamayasamupajanitajanatńĀnurńĀgaparipihitabhuvanasamartthitaprathitabńĀlńĀdityadvi
tńęyanńĀmńĀ paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł• ŇõrńędhruvasenaŠļĖ kuŇõalńę sarvvńĀn eva yathńĀsambadhyamńĀnakńĀn samańĀj√ĪńĀpayaty astu va
s saŠĻĀviditaŠĻĀ yathńĀ mayńĀ mńĀtńĀpitroŠłę puŠĻáyńĀpyańĀyanńĀyaŠł• UdumbaragahvaravinirggatńĀgastikńĀgrńĀhńĀrńĀnivńĀsiUccya
mńĀnacńĀturvvidyasńĀmńĀnyapńĀrńĀŇõarasagotravńĀjasaneyasabrahmacńĀribrńĀhmaŠĻáakumńĀrasvńĀmiputrabrńĀhmaŠĻáa
AgnisvńĀmine tathńĀ jambusaravinirggatńĀyńĀnakńĀgrńĀhńĀranivńĀsiUccyamńĀnacńĀturvvidyasńĀmńĀnyakauŇõikasa
gotravńĀjasaneyasabrahmacńĀribrńĀhmaŠĻáamaheŇõvaraputrabrńĀhmaŠĻáasaŠĻĀgaravaye mńĀlavake UccyamńĀnabhu
ktau navagrńĀmakagrńĀmapŇęrvvasńęmni bhaktńęŇõataŠĻĀ yasyńĀghńĀŠĻ≠anńĀni pŇęrvvataŠł• varńĀhoŠĻ≠akagrńĀmakaŠĻÖkaŠĻ≠aŠł• dakŠĻ£iŠĻáato
nadńę AparataŠł• lakŠĻ£maŠĻáapaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ikńĀ UttarataŠł• pulindńĀnakagrńĀmakaŠĻÖkaŠĻ≠aŠł• Evam etac caturńĀghńĀŠĻ≠anaviŇõuddhaŠĻĀ bhaktńęŇõataŠĻĀ
sodraŠĻÖgaŠĻĀ soparikaraŠĻĀ sabhŇętavńĀtapratyńĀyaŠĻĀ sadhńĀnyahirarŠĻáyeńĀdeyaŠĻĀ sadaŇõaparńĀdhaŠĻĀ sotpadyamńĀnaviŠĻ£ŠĻ≠ikaŠĻĀ sarvvarńĀja
kńęyńĀnńĀm ahastaprakŠĻ£aepaŠĻáńęyaŠĻĀ pŇęrvvaprattadevabrahmadeyabrańĀhmaŠĻáaviŠĻÖŇõatirahitaŠĻĀ bhŇęmicchidranyańĀyenańĀcandrańĀrkńĀrŠĻáŠĻáavakŠĻ£i
tisaritparvvatasamakańĀlńęnaŠĻĀ putrapoautrńĀnvayabhogyaŠĻĀ UdakńĀtisarggeŠĻáa dharmmadńĀyo nisŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻ≠aŠł• yato nayocar ucitayńĀ
brahmadeyasthityńĀ gbhu√ĪjatoŠł• kŠĻõŠĻ£atoŠł• kaphrŠĻ£ayatoŠł• pradiŇõator vvńĀ na kaiŇõcid vyańĀsedhe varttitavyam ńĀgńĀmibhadranŠĻõpa
tibhir aypy asmadvaŠĻÖŇõajair anyeair vvńĀ AnityańĀny aiŇõvaryyńĀŠĻáy asthiraŠĻĀ mańĀnuŠĻ£yaŠĻĀ sańĀmańĀnya√Ī ca bhŇęmidńĀnaphalam avagacchadbhir aya
m asmaddańĀyo numantavyaŠł• paripańĀlayitavyaŇõ cety ukta√Ī ca .

lg.l:
yasya yasya yadańĀ bhŇęmais tasya
tasya tadańĀ phalaM

nirbhuktamańĀlyapratimańĀni tńĀni ko nńĀma ŇõsńĀdhuŠłę punana
r ńĀydadńęta .
ńÄcchettańĀ cańĀnumatntańĀ ca tańĀny aeva narake vased iti .

div.p:
dŇętako tra rńĀjaputraŇõrńękharagrahaŠł•
likhitam idaŠĻĀ sandhivigrahańĀdhigkŠĻõtadivirapativatrabhaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠aiputradivirapatiskandabhaŠĻ≠ena . saŠĻĀ 300 20 bhadrapada ba 5 svahasto mama ..
